title: NEB Phusion High-Fidelity PCR
description: New England Biolabs Phusion High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase (M0530): 50 uL high-fidelity reaction with 5X HF buffer and a 72 C extension.

payload.notes: Vendor: New England Biolabs (NEB), Phusion High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase #M0530. Add Phusion last (its 3'->5' exonuclease degrades primers without dNTPs). Use 5X Phusion HF Buffer by default; switch to 5X GC Buffer for GC-rich or structured templates. Annealing: use the NEB Tm Calculator; for primers >20 nt anneal ~3 C above the lower-Tm primer, for primers <= 20 nt anneal at the lower primer Tm. The 60 C shown is a placeholder starting point. Cycles 25-35. Extension 15 sec/kb (low-complexity) to 30 sec/kb (genomic), do not exceed 1 min/kb. For GC-rich add 3% DMSO. Phusion produces blunt ends. A 2-step protocol works for primers with Ta > 72 C. Source: https://www.neb.com/en-us/protocols/pcr-protocol-m0530
